reasoning: The market estimate is at 4%, and web searches confirm that TSLA stock is currently trading around $430 in late October 2025. This stock has not dropped below $200 yet in 2025. For the resolution to be YES, TSLA would have to lose more than half of its value (a drop of over 50% from ~$430 to under $200) within the next two months. Barring an extreme black swan event, this is highly unlikely. Given the short time horizon and the massive drop required, the probability is very low, consistent with the 4% market estimate. I am going slightly lower due to the passage of an additional 10 days since the Manifold market snapshot and the reported bullish TSLA moves in late October.
